question: List pre-miRNAs that develop into miRNAs ending with '214-3p' and participate in the biological process labeled as 'cellular response to dopamine', along with the GO terms that are part of that process.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process {Label: 'cellular response to dopamine'})<-[:part_of]-(go:GO) WHERE m.Label ENDS WITH '214-3p' RETURN  pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, go.Label AS GOpart

question: How many pre-miRNAs develop into miRNAs participating in the biological process labeled as 'cellular response to dopamine', where GO terms are part of this process? Return the count of distinct pre-miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process {Label:'cellular response to dopamine'})<-[:part_of]-(go:GO) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT pre) AS Pre_miRNACount

question: Which miRNAs participate in biological processes whose disruption is caused by diseases that have the phenotypes 'Downturned corners of mouth' or 'Abnormal foot morphology'? Return labels of the: phenotypes, diseases, disrupted biological processes, and miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease)-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) WHERE p.Label IN ['Downturned corners of mouth', 'Abnormal foot morphology'] RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, d.Label AS Disease, bp.Label AS DisruptedProcess, m.Label AS miRNA

question: How many miRNAs participate in biological processes whose disruption is caused by diseases that have phenotypes?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease)-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNACount

question: Which biological processes are characterized by GO terms as parts in which miRNAs transcribed from genes participate in? Return the label of the: genes, miRNAs, GO terms, and biological processes.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(go:GO)<-[:has_part]-(bp:Biological_process) RETURN  g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA, go.Label AS GOterm, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: Which GO terms do miRNAs transcribed from genes with labels ending in ‘B’ participate in, where those GO terms are parts of biological processes? Return the labels of the genes, miRNAs, GO terms, and biological processes.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(go:GO)<-[:has_part]-(bp:Biological_process) WHERE g.Label ENDS WITH 'B' RETURN g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA, go.Label AS GOterm, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: Which GO terms do miRNAs transcribed from the gene 'MIR3651' participate in, and which biological processes have those GO terms as parts? Return the labels of the miRNAs, GO terms, and biological processes.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene {Label: 'MIR3651'})-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(go:GO)<-[:has_part]-(bp:Biological_process) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, go.Label AS GOterm, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: How many distinct genes transcribed to miRNAs that participate in GO terms, where biological processes have those GO terms as parts? Return the count of distinct genes
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(go:GO)<-[:has_part]-(bp:Biological_process) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS GeneCount

question: Which GO terms are parts of cellular components in which the miRNA 'hsa-miR-205-5p' is located? Return the label of the: cellular components and GO terms.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Label: 'hsa-miR-205-5p'})-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)<-[:part_of]-(go:GO) RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, go.Label AS GOterm

question: Which GO terms are parts of cellular components whose description contains the string 'extracellular region' in which the miRNA 'hsa-miR-106b-5p' is located? Return ONLY the entire nodes of type 'GO'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Label:'hsa-miR-106b-5p'})-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)<-[:part_of]-(go:GO) WHERE cc.Description CONTAINS 'extracellular region' RETURN go

question: Which GO terms are part of other GO terms that the miRNA 'hsa-miR-21-5p' acts upstream of? Return labels of both GO terms.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Label:'hsa-miR-21-5p'})-[:acts_upstream_of]->(go1:GO)<-[:part_of]-(go2:GO) RETURN go1.Label AS UpstreamGOterm, go2.Label AS PartGOterm

question: Which miRNAs act upstream of GO terms that have parts other GO terms whose descriptions contain 'blood'? Return the miRNA labels and the descriptions of the GO terms that are part of other GO terms.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:acts_upstream_of]->(go1:GO)<-[:part_of]-(go2:GO) WHERE go2.Description CONTAINS 'blood' RETURN go2.Description AS GO_Description, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which GO terms are part of cellular components in which miRNAs developed from the pre-miRNA 'microRNA hsa-mir-519a precursor (hsa-mir-519a-2)' are located? Return the label of the: miRNAs, cellular components, and GO terms.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA {Label: 'microRNA hsa-mir-519a precursor (hsa-mir-519a-2)'})-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)<-[:part_of]-(go:GO) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent, go.Label AS GOterm

question: Which GO terms are part of cellular components in which miRNAs developed from the pre-miRNA 'microRNA hsa-mir-519a precursor (hsa-mir-519a-2)' are located? Return the label of the: miRNAs, cellular components, and GO terms.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA {Label: 'microRNA hsa-mir-519a precursor (hsa-mir-519a-2)'})-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)<-[:part_of]-(go:GO) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent, go.Label AS GOterm

question: Count the distinct GO terms that are parts of GO terms which miRNAs developed from the pre-miRNA ‘microRNA hsa-mir-221 precursor’ act upstream of.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA {Label: 'microRNA hsa-mir-221 precursor'})-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:acts_upstream_of]->(go1:GO)<-[:part_of]-(go:GO) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT go) AS GOTermCount

question: Count the distinct miRNAs that the pre-miRNA ‘microRNA hsa-mir-519a precursor (hsa-mir-519a-2)’ develops into, which are located in cellular components that have GO terms as parts (i.e., GO terms are part of those cellular components). Return the count of distinct miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA {Label: 'microRNA hsa-mir-519a precursor (hsa-mir-519a-2)'})-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)<-[:part_of]-(go:GO) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNACount

question: Which cancers express miRNAs that have molecular functions as part of the biological process labeled as 'MAPK cascade'? Return the label of the: molecular functions, miRNAs, and cancers.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process {Label:'MAPK cascade'})<-[:part_of]-(mf:Molecular_function)<-[:has_function]-(m:miRNA)<-[:expresses]-(c:Cancer) RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer

question: Find miRNAs and their sequence and genomic coordinates, that are expressed in the cancer labeled as 'familial multiple lipomatosis' and have molecular functions that are parts of biological processes? Return the label of the: biological processes, molecular functions and miRNAs, along with the miRNA sequences and genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process )<-[:part_of]-(mf:Molecular_function)<-[:has_function]-(m:miRNA)<-[:expresses]-(c:Cancer {Label: 'familial multiple lipomatosis'}) RETURN  bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, m.Label AS miRNA_Label, m.Sequence AS miRNA_Sequence, m.Genomic_coordinates AS miRNA_Genomic_coordinates

question: Which miRNAs are expressed in the cancer labeled 'adenoma' and have molecular functions that are part of biological processes? Return the label of the: biological processes, molecular functions and miRNAs, and molecular function descriptions.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process )<-[:part_of]-(mf:Molecular_function)<-[:has_function]-(m:miRNA)<-[:expresses]-(c:Cancer{Label: 'adenoma'}) RETURN bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, mf.Label AS MolecularFunctionLabel, mf.Description AS MolecularFunctionDescription, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which miRNAs participate in biological processes whose disruption is caused by diseases that have the phenotype labeled as 'Renovascular hypertension'? Return the label of diseases, biological processes, and miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype {Label:'Renovascular hypertension'})-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease)-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Identify miRNAs participating in biological processes whose disruption is caused by a disease that has the phenotype labeled as 'Hypoplastic pubic ramus'. Return the label of the diseases, biological processes, miRNAs, and the miRNA genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype {Label:'Hypoplastic pubic ramus'})-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease)-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, m.Label AS miRNA_Label, m.Genomic_coordinates AS miRNA_Genomic_coordinates

question: Identify miRNAs that are participants in biological processes whose disruption causes the disease labeled as 'Telangiectasia of the skin' that has the phenotype labeled as 'blood coagulation disease'. Return the label of biological processes and miRNAs, along with the miRNA sequence lengths.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype {Label:'Telangiectasia of the skin'})-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease {Label:'blood coagulation disease'})-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) RETURN bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS SequenceLength

question: Which miRNAs participate in biological processes whose disruption is caused by diseases that have the phenotype 'Uterine rupture'? Return labels of diseases, disrupted biological processes, and miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype {Label:'Uterine rupture'})-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease)-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which cancers express miRNAs that participate in biological processes occurring in the cellular component labeled as 'intracellular anatomical structure'? Return the label of biological processes, miRNAs, and cancers.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component {Label:'intracellular anatomical structure'})<-[:occurs_in]-(bp:Biological_process)<-[:participates_in]-(m:miRNA)<-[:expresses]-(c:Cancer) RETURN bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer

question: Which biological processes, including all their properties, occur in cellular components and have miRNAs expressed by the cancer labeled as 'lipoma' participating in them? Return the cellular component label, miRNA label, and properties of the biological processes.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component)<-[:occurs_in]-(bp:Biological_process)<-[:participates_in]-(m:miRNA)<-[:expresses]-(c:Cancer {Label:'lipoma'}) RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, m.Label AS miRNA, properties(bp)

question: Which autoimmune diseases have the phenotype labeled as 'Growth delay', where this phenotype is a feature of diseases of which the neurodegenerative disease labeled as 'Cockayne syndrome type 2' is a subclass? Return the label of the parent diseases and autoimmune diseases.
cypher: MATCH (nd:Neurodegenerative_disease {Label: 'Cockayne syndrome type 2'})-[:subclassof]->(d:Disease)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype {Label: 'Growth delay'})-[:phenotype_of]->(ad:Autoimmune_disease) RETURN d.Label AS ParentDisease, ad.Label AS AutoimmuneDisease

question: Which autoimmune diseases have the phenotype labeled as 'Cutaneous photosensitivity', where this phenotype is a feature of diseases of which the neurodegenerative disease labeled as 'COFS syndrome' is a subclass? Return the label of the parent disease and the autoimmune diseases.
cypher: MATCH (nd:Neurodegenerative_disease {Label: 'COFS syndrome'})-[:subclassof]->(d:Disease)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype {Label:'Cutaneous photosensitivity'})-[:phenotype_of]->(ad:Autoimmune_disease) RETURN d.Label AS ParentDisease, ad.Label AS AutoimmuneDisease

question: Which cancers express miRNAs that participate in biological processes having the molecular function labeled as 'death receptor activity' as a part? Return labels of biological processes, miRNAs, and cancers.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function {Label:'death receptor activity'})<-[:has_part]-(bp:Biological_process)<-[:participates_in]-(m:miRNA)<-[:expresses]-(c:Cancer) RETURN bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer

question: Which genes are transcribed into miRNAs that regulate the activity of target genes causing or contributing to diseases? Return the label of the source genes, miRNAs, target genes, diseases, and the sequence lengths of both source and target genes.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(t:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) RETURN g.Label AS SourceGene, m.Label AS miRNA, t.Label AS TargetGene, d.Label AS Disease, SIZE(g.Sequence) AS SourceGeneLength, SIZE(t.Sequence) AS TargetGeneLength

question: Which diseases that have the phenotype labeled as 'Fatigue' are subclasses of cancers expressing miRNAs ending with '3p'? Return the label of diseases, parent cancers, and miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype {Label:'Fatigue'})-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA) WHERE m.Label ENDS WITH '3p' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, c.Label AS ParentCancer, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Retrieve all properties of the diseases that have the phenotype labeled 'Heart block' and are subclasses of cancers that express miRNAs ending with '5p'. Return the label of miRNA and cancer, and the properties of the disease (use PROPERTIES(disease)).
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype {Label:'Heart block'})-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA) WHERE m.Label ENDS WITH '5p' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer, PROPERTIES(d)

question: For each neurodegenerative disease whose label contains the word 'acute', that is a subclass of a disease, show how many phenotypic features (phenotypes) the parent diseases have and of which autoimmune diseases these phenotypes are traits. Return the label of the neurodegenerative disease, parent disease, the count of distinct phenotypes, phenotype labels, and related autoimmune disease labels, ordered by phenotype count in descending order.
cypher: MATCH (nd:Neurodegenerative_disease)-[:subclassof]->(d:Disease)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(ad:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE nd.Label CONTAINS 'acute' RETURN nd.Label AS NeurodegenerativeDisease, d.Label AS ParentDisease, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS PhenotypeCount, COLLECT(DISTINCT p.Label) AS Phenotypes, COLLECT(DISTINCT ad.Label) AS RelatedAutoimmuneDiseases ORDER BY PhenotypeCount DESC

question: Find the genomic coordinates in which are located miRNAs that participate in GO terms regulated by other different GO terms. Moreover, the latter GO terms are also in a relationship with the biological processes labeled as 'regulation of protein kinase activity' where the biological processes are part of the GO term. Return labels of both the GO terms, miRNAs, and the miRNA genomic coordinates
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process {Label:'regulation of protein kinase activity'})-[:part_of]->(go1:GO)-[:regulates]->(go2:GO)<-[:participates_in]-(m:miRNA) RETURN go1.Label AS ParentGO, go2.Label AS RegulatedGO, m.Label AS miRNA_Label, m.Genomic_coordinates AS miRNA_Genomic_coordinates

question: List all miRNAs that participate in GO terms regulated by other GO terms. Moreover, the latter GO terms have a as part the biological processes labeled as 'serine phosphorylation of STAT protein'. Return the label of the parent GO terms, regulated GO terms, and miRNAs, along with the miRNA sequences.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process {Label: 'serine phosphorylation of STAT protein'})-[:part_of]->(go1:GO)-[:regulates]->(go2:GO)<-[:participates_in]-(m:miRNA) RETURN go1.Label AS ParentGO, go2.Label AS RegulatedGO, m.Label AS miRNA_Label, m.Sequence AS miRNA_Sequence

question: For each pair of GO terms where one GO term regulates another GO term, considering only those regulated GO terms that have the biological process 'regulation of protein kinase activity' as part of them, how many distinct miRNAs participate in each regulated GO term? Return the label of the regulating (parent) GO term, the regulated GO term, and the number of distinct participating miRNAs, ordered by the miRNA count in descending order.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process {Label:'regulation of protein kinase activity'})-[:part_of]->(go1:GO)-[:regulates]->(go2:GO)<-[:participates_in]-(m:miRNA) RETURN go1.Label AS ParentGO, go2.Label AS RegulatedGO, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNACount ORDER BY miRNACount DESC

question: Find cardiovascular diseases that cause disruption of GO terms having as characteristic the phenotypes of other diseases. Return labels of the cardiovascular disease, GO terms, phenotypes, and diseases.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)<-[:phenotype_of]-(p:Phenotype)<-[:has_characteristic]-(g:GO)<-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]-(cd:Cardiovascular_disease) RETURN cd.Label AS CardiovascularDisease, g.Label AS DisruptedGO, p.Label AS Phenotype, d.Label AS RelatedDisease

question: Which cancers express miRNAs longer than 21 nucleotides that participate in biological processes labeled as 'autophagy', where those biological processes are subclasses of other biological processes? Return the labels of the cancers, the miRNAs, the miRNA sequence length, and the label of the parent biological process.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:subclassof]->(bp2:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'autophagy' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) > 21 RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS miRNASequenceLength, bp2.Label AS ParentBiologicalProcess

question: Which cancers express miRNAs that participate in biological processes, and what are the parent biological processes of those biological processes? What experimental methods were used to detect the expression? Return the labels of the cancers, miRNAs, experimental methods, and the parent biological process labels.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[r:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:subclassof]->(bp2:Biological_process) RETURN DISTINCT c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, r.Method AS ExperimentalMethods, bp2.Label AS ParentBiologicalProcess

question: Consider cancers. How many distinct miRNAs do they express? Keep only miRNAs that participate in biological processes where those biological processes are subclasses of other biological processes. Return the cancer labels and the count of distinct miRNAs, ordered by miRNA count (in descending order).
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:subclassof]->(bp2:Biological_process) RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNACount ORDER BY miRNACount DESC

question: List phenotypes that characterize GO terms which are part of the biological process labeled as 'bone development' where those biological processes have as participant the miRNA whose label contains '7i', along with their descriptions. Return the phenotype labels, phenotype descriptions, GO term labels and miRNA label
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype)-[:characteristic_of]->(g:GO)-[:part_of]->(bp:Biological_process {Label: 'bone development'})-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) WHERE m.Label CONTAINS '7i' RETURN p.Label AS PhenotypeLabel, p.Description AS PhenotypeDescription, g.Label AS GOterm, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which phenotypes characterize GO terms that are part of the biological process labeled as 'copulation' where those biological processes have miRNA participant? Return the phenotype labels, GO term labels and miRNA label.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype)-[:characteristic_of]->(g:GO)-[:part_of]->(bp:Biological_process {Label: 'copulation'})-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, g.Label AS GOterm,m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which miRNAs are under-expressed in the cancer labeled as 'neurofibromatosis type 1', and what is the label of the disease that the cancer is a subclass of and that causes disruption of GO terms ? Also, what source(s) are reported on the subclassof relationship? Return the miRNA label, the parent disease label, the GO term label  and the subclassof source(s)
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer {Label:'neurofibromatosis type 1'})-[r:subclassof]->(d:Disease)-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(go:GO) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, d.Label AS ParentDisease, go.Label AS GOterm,  r.Source AS Sources

question: Which miRNAs starting with 'hsa-miR-63' are over-expressed in cancers that are subclasses of diseases which predispose towards other cancers? Return the miRNA label, the parent disease label, the original cancer label, and the cancer that the disease predisposes towards.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(c1:Cancer)-[:subclassof]->(d:Disease)-[:predisposes_towards]->(c2:Cancer) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-63' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, d.Label AS ParentDisease, c1.Label AS Cancer, c2.Label AS PredisposedCancer

question: Which miRNAs are under-expressed in the cancer labeled 'neoplastic meningitis', where that cancer is a subclass of a disease whose label contains the word 'metastatic' that have a characteristic phenotype? Return the label of miRNA and parent disease, the phenotype label and the sources reporting the under-expression relationship.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer {Label: 'neoplastic meningitis'})-[:subclassof]->(d:Disease)-[:has_characteristic]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'metastatic' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, d.Label AS ParentDisease,  p.Label AS Phenotype, r.Source AS Sources

question: Which miRNAs ending with '620' are under-expressed in cancers that are subclasses of diseases whose label contains the word 'malignant' and that have the phenotype 'Fine hair'? Return the miRNA label, cancer label, parent disease label, the FDR value of the under-expression, and the phenotype label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer)-[:subclassof]->(d:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype {Label:'Fine hair'}) WHERE m.Label ENDS WITH '620' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'malignant' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer, d.Label AS ParentDisease, r.FDR AS FDR, p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Which miRNAs containing the letter 'f' are over-expressed in cancers that are subclasses of malignant cancers and have phenotypes containing the word 'painful'? Return the miRNA label, the cancer label, the parent cancer label, and the phenotype label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer)-[:subclassof]->(d:Cancer)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE m.Label CONTAINS 'f' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'malignant' AND p.Label CONTAINS 'painful' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer, d.Label AS ParentDisease, p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Count all distinct miRNAs that are either over-expressed or under-expressed in cancers that are subclasses of other cancers and have associated phenotypes? Return the total count of distinct miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in|under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer)-[:subclassof]->(d:Cancer)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNACount

question: How many distinct miRNAs are expressed in diseases that are subclasses of cancers which also express a different miRNA? Count only miRNAs that are different from the miRNAs expressed directly by the cancer.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA)-[:expressed_in]->(d:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m2:miRNA) WHERE m1 <> m2 RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT m1) AS miRNACount

question: What are the top five diseases that are subclasses of cancers, where the parent cancer (that the disease is a subclass of) has the highest number of distinct miRNAs that are expressed in, under-expressed in, or over-expressed in that cancer? In case of ties, order the diseases alphabetically. Return the disease label and the total count of distinct miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(:Cancer)<-[:expressed_in|under_expressed_in|over_expressed_in]-(m:miRNA) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNACount ORDER BY miRNACount DESC, d.Label ASC LIMIT 5

question: What are the top five diseases that are subclasses of cancers and have at least one over-expressed miRNA, with the highest number of phenotypes? In case of ties, order them alphabetically. Return the disease label and the total count of distinct phenotypes.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(d:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(:Cancer), (d)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS PhenotypeCount ORDER BY PhenotypeCount DESC, d.Label ASC LIMIT 5

question: What are the top five diseases that are subclasses of cancers and have at least one over-expressed miRNA, with the lowest number of phenotypes? In case of ties, order them alphabetically. Return the disease label and the total count of distinct phenotypes.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(d:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(:Cancer), (d)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS PhenotypeCount ORDER BY PhenotypeCount ASC, d.Label ASC LIMIT 5

question: Find the genes regulated by mature miRNAs that develop from the 'MIR744' gene through pre-miRNA maturation. Return the pre-miRNA label, mature miRNA label, and target gene label.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene {Label: 'MIR744'})-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(t:Gene) RETURN pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS Mature_miRNA, t.Label AS TargetGene

question: Find the genes that transcribe pre-miRNAs which develop into miRNAs that regulate the activity of the target gene 'SMG1P7'. Return the pre-miRNA label and mature miRNA label.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(t:Gene {Label: 'SMG1P7'}) RETURN  pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS Mature_miRNA, t.Label AS TargetGene

question: Find the genes that transcribe pre-miRNAs which develop into miRNAs that do not end with 'p' and regulate the activity of either target genes 'SMG1P6' and 'SMG1P7'. Return the label of the: gene, pre-miRNA, and miRNA.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(t:Gene) WHERE t.Label IN ['SMG1P6', 'SMG1P7'] AND NOT m.Label ENDS WITH 'p' RETURN g.Label AS SourceGene, pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS Mature_miRNA

question: Find the genes that transcribe pre-miRNAs which develop into miRNAs that do not end with 'p' and regulate the activity of either target genes 'SMG1P6' or 'SMG1P7'. Return the labels of the genes, pre-miRNAs, and mature miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(t:Gene) WHERE (t.Label = 'SMG1P6' OR t.Label = 'SMG1P7')  AND NOT m.Label ENDS WITH 'p' RETURN g.Label AS SourceGene, pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS Mature_miRNA, t.Label AS TargetGene

question: Count the number of distinct genes that transcribe pre-miRNAs which develop into miRNAs that regulate the activity of target genes with a label ending in three digits.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(t:Gene) WHERE t.Label =~ '.*[0-9]{3}$' RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS RegulatingGeneCount

question: Which sources localize miRNAs expressed in diseases into cellular components where the biological process labeled as 'mitochondrial RNA modification' occurs? Return the cellular component label, miRNA label, disease label, and the source confirming the information.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[:occurs_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[r:location_of]->(m:miRNA)-[:expressed_in]->(d:Disease) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'mitochondrial RNA modification' RETURN  cc.Label AS CellularComponent, m.Label AS miRNA, d.Label AS Disease, r.Source

question: Find target genes ending with 'P6' that are regulated by mature miRNAs developed from pre-miRNAs transcribed from genes ending with 'A'. Return the labels of the genes, pre-miRNA, and mature miRNA.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(pm:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(t:Gene) WHERE g.Label ENDS WITH 'A' AND t.Label ENDS WITH 'P6' RETURN g.Label AS Gene, pm.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS Mature_miRNA, t.Label AS TargetGene

question: Count the number of genes that are transcribed into pre-miRNAs which develop into miRNAs regulating target genes whose labels start and end with a latin letter (A-Z, a-z).
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(t:Gene) WHERE t.Label =~ '^[A-Za-z].*[A-Za-z]$' RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS RegulatingGeneCount

question: Count the number of genes that are transcribed into pre-miRNAs which develop into miRNAs regulating target genes whose labels start and end with the same latin letter.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(t:Gene) WHERE t.Label =~ '^([A-Za-z]).*\1$' RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS RegulatingGeneCount

question: Which autoimmune diseases have phenotypes that are also phenotypes of cancers expressing the miRNA 'hsa-let-7a-5p'? Return the labels of the autoimmune disease, phenotype, and cancer.
cypher: MATCH (ad:Autoimmune_disease)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA { Label:'hsa-let-7a-5p'} ) RETURN ad.Label AS AutoimmuneDisease, p.Label AS Phenotype, c.Label AS Cancer

question: Trace the sources of the 'disease_has_feature' relationship types for the autoimmune diseases that have phenotypes which are also phenotypes of cancers expressing the miRNA 'hsa-let-7a-3p'. Return the labels of the autoimmune disease, phenotype, cancer, and the relationship sources.
cypher: MATCH (ad:Autoimmune_disease)-[r:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA {Label:'hsa-let-7a-3p'}) RETURN ad.Label AS AutoimmuneDisease, p.Label AS Phenotype, c.Label AS Cancer, r.Source

question: Which diseases are caused or contributed to by genes that genetically interact with other genes regulated by miRNAs ending with '3p'? Return the labels of the miRNA, genes, and disease.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g1:Gene)-[:genetically_interacts_with]->(g2:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) WHERE m.Label ENDS WITH '3p' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g1.Label AS Regulated_Gene, g2.Label AS Interacting_Gene, d.Label AS Disease

question: Retrieve the 'GeneMANIA_weight' of the genetic interaction between genes regulated by miRNAs. Keep only genes that cause or contribute to diseases whose label contains the word 'hereditary'. Return the labels of the miRNA, genes, disease, and the 'GeneMANIA_weight'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g1:Gene)-[r:genetically_interacts_with]->(g2:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'hereditary' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g1.Label AS Regulated_Gene, g2.Label AS Interacting_Gene, d.Label AS Disease, r.GeneMANIA_weight

question: Which sources report the interaction between genes regulated by miRNAs and genes that cause or contribute to diseases whose label contains the word 'disk'? Return the labels of the miRNA, genes, disease, and the sources confirming the interaction.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g1:Gene)-[r:genetically_interacts_with]->(g2:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'disk' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g1.Label AS Regulated_Gene, g2.Label AS Interacting_Gene, d.Label AS Disease, r.Source

question: How many diseases are caused or contributed by the gene 'TGFB1', which genetically interacts with the gene 'ABCF2' regulated by the miRNA 'hsa-miR-486-5p'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Label: 'hsa-miR-486-5p'})-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g1:Gene {Label: 'ABCF2'})-[:genetically_interacts_with]->(g2:Gene {Label: 'TGFB1'})-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT d) AS DiseaseCount

question: List the cancers that express the miRNA 'hsa-let-7a-5p', the experimental methods reporting its expression, and the cellular components where it is located, along with the GO terms of which those cellular components are part.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[r:expresses]->(m:miRNA{Label:'hsa-let-7a-5p'})-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)<-[:part_of]-(g:GO) RETURN  c.Label AS Cancer, cc.Label AS CellularComponent, g.Label AS GOterm, r.Method

question: Which GO terms are part of cellular components where the 'hsa-let-7a-5p' miRNA when expressed by cancers whose label contains the word 'benign' is located? Return also the experimental methods reporting the expression.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[r:expresses]->(m:miRNA{Label:'hsa-let-7a-5p'})-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)<-[:part_of]-(g:GO) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'benign' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, cc.Label AS CellularComponent, g.Label AS GOterm, r.Source

question: Which sources report the transcription of genes that produce pre-miRNAs, which develop into miRNAs causing or contributing to the disease labeled as 'atherosclerosis'?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[r:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease {Label:'atherosclerosis'}) RETURN g.Label AS Gene, pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA, r.Source

question: Count the number of distinct miRNAs, developed from pre-miRNAs transcribed from genes, that cause or contribute to the disease labeled as 'atherosclerosis'.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease {Label:'atherosclerosis'}) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNACount

question: Identify diseases whose label contains the word 'dysgenesis' that have as phenotypes the ones characterizing GO terms that are parts of biological processes. Keep only the phenotype-GO associations confirmed by the source named 'HPO'. Return the disease label, phenotype label, GO term label, biological process label, and the source.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype)-[r:characteristic_of]->(g:GO)-[:part_of]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'dysgenesis' AND 'HPO' IN r.Source RETURN d.Label AS Disease, p.Label AS Phenotype, g.Label AS GOterm, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, r.Source

question: Retrieve all properties of diseases whose label contains the string 'Rabin-Pappas' that have phenotypes characterizing GO terms which are parts of biological processes. Return the disease properties, phenotype label, GO term label, and biological process label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype)-[:characteristic_of]->(g:GO)-[:part_of]->(bp:Biological_process) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'Rabin-Pappas' RETURN properties(d), p.Label AS Phenotype, g.Label AS GOterm, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: Identify diseases whose label contains the word 'orofacial' and have phenotypes characterizing GO terms that are not part of any biological process. Return the disease label, phenotype label, and GO term label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype)-[:characteristic_of]->(g:GO) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'orofacial' AND NOT (g)-[:part_of]->(:Biological_process) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, p.Label AS Phenotype, g.Label AS GOterm

question: Return the top 5 diseases with the highest amount of distinct phenotypes that characterize GO terms which are part of biological processes. In case of ties, order alphabetically by disease label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype)-[:characteristic_of]->(g:GO)-[:part_of]->(:Biological_process) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS PhenotypeCount ORDER BY PhenotypeCount DESC, d.Label ASC LIMIT 5

question: List all diseases caused by the disruption of GO terms that have pre-miRNA participants developing into the 'hsa-miR-762' miRNA. Return the disease label, GO term label and pre-miRNA label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:disease_caused_by_disruption_of]->(g:GO)-[:has_participant]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA{Label:'hsa-miR-762'}) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, g.Label AS GOterm, pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA

question: List diseases caused by the disruption of GO terms that have the pre-miRNA labeled as 'microRNA hsa-mir-324 precursor' as a participant. Note that this pre-miRNA develops into miRNAs. Return the disease label, GO term label, pre-miRNA label, miRNA label, and the source reporting the disruption.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[r:disease_caused_by_disruption_of]->(g:GO)-[:has_participant]->(pre:pre_miRNA {Label:'microRNA hsa-mir-324 precursor'})-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, g.Label AS GOterm, pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA, r.Source AS DisruptionSource

question: List diseases caused by the disruption of GO terms that have pre-miRNA participants which develop into miRNAs. Return the disease label, GO term label, pre-miRNA label, miRNA label, and the source reporting the pre-miRNA to miRNA development relationship.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:disease_caused_by_disruption_of]->(g:GO)-[:has_participant]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[r:develops_into]->(m:miRNA) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, g.Label AS GOterm, pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA, r.Source AS DevelopmentSource

question: Count the diseases caused by the disruption of GO terms that in which pre-miRNAs participate. Consider only pre-miRNAs developing into miRNAs; and keep only and entries where the sources reporting the development relationship includes 'miRBase'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:disease_caused_by_disruption_of]->(g:GO)-[:has_participant]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[r:develops_into]->(m:miRNA) WHERE 'miRBase' IN r.Source RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT d) AS DiseaseCount

question: Return diseases whose label contains the word 'perceptual' that are caused by disruption of GO terms which have pre-miRNA participants developing into miRNAs. Keep only entries where 'RNAcentral' is one of the sources reporting the participation relationship. Return the disease, GO term, pre-miRNA, miRNA, and the participation source in the output.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:disease_caused_by_disruption_of]->(g:GO)-[r:has_participant]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'perceptual' AND 'RNAcentral' IN r.Source RETURN d.Label AS Disease, g.Label AS GOterm, pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA, r.Source AS ParticipationSource

question: How many distinct miRNAs are over-expressed in diseases that are subclasses of cancer whose label contains the string 'lymphoid leukemia', where those cancer have phenotypes with labels containing 'Sepsis'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(d:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(c:Cancer)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'lymphoid leukemia' AND p.Label CONTAINS 'Sepsis' RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNACount

question: How many distinct miRNAs are under-expressed in diseases whose labels contain the word 'chronic' that are subclasses of cancers whose have phenotypes containing the string 'Abnormal' in their labels?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(d:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(c:Cancer)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'chronic' AND p.Label CONTAINS 'Abnormal' RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNACount

question: Which pre-miRNAs develop into the 'hsa-miR-20a-5p' miRNA where the latter regulates genes causing or contributing to diseases whose labels contain 'bone osteosarcoma'? Return pre-miRNA/gene/disease labels and include also the synonyms of the genes.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA {Label:'hsa-miR-20a-5p'})-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'bone osteosarcoma' RETURN pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, g.Label AS GeneLabel, g.Synonym AS GeneSynonym, d.Label AS Disease

question: How many different diseases are caused or contributed by genes regulated by the miRNA 'hsa-miR-20a-5p' when it develops from known pre-miRNAs?
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA {Label: 'hsa-miR-20a-5p'})-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT d) AS DiseaseCount

question: Consider diseases that are subclasses of the cancer labeled as 'benign muscle neoplasm'. List the miRNAs expressed in those cancers and the genes these miRNAs regulate, but consider ONLY genes whose label is exactly 7 character-long.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(c:Cancer {Label:'benign muscle neoplasm'} )-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene) WHERE SIZE(g.Label) = 7 RETURN d.Label AS Disease, c.Label AS ParentCancer, m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene

question: Consider diseases that are subclasses of cancers whose label contains the word 'muscle'. Retrieve the miRNAs these cancers express and the genes with activity regulated by those miRNAs, restricting the result set to genes whose label is stricly longer than 9 characters.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'muscle' AND size(g.Label) > 9 RETURN  d.Label AS Disease, c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene

question: Which GO terms have as part cellular components that are the location of pre-miRNAs developing into miRNAs causing or contributing to the autoimmune disease labeled as 'osteoarthritis'. Return the GO term, cellular component, pre-miRNA and miRNA labels
cypher: MATCH (g:GO)-[:has_part]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:location_of]->(pm:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Autoimmune_disease {Label:'osteoarthritis'}) RETURN g.Label AS GOterm, cc.Label AS CellularComponent, pm.Label AS pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA

question: What are the top 8 cellular components that GO terms have as parts and that are location of the highest amount of distinct miRNAs developed from pre-miRNAs that cause or contribute to the autoimmune disease labeled as 'osteoarthritis'? Return the cellular component label and the count of miRNAs. To avoid ties, order also alphabetically by cellular component label.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO)-[:has_part]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:location_of]->(pm:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Autoimmune_disease {Label: 'osteoarthritis'}) RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNACount ORDER BY miRNACount DESC, cc.Label ASC LIMIT 8

question: List all pre-miRNAs that develop into miRNAs which interact with other pre-miRNAs transcribed from genes. Return the labels of the precursors, miRNAs, and gene.
cypher: MATCH (pm1:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:interacts_with]->(pm2:pre_miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene) RETURN pm1.Label AS Precursor, m.Label AS Mature_miRNA, pm2.Label AS InteractingPrecursor, g.Label AS Gene

question: Count the number of miRNAs that regulate the activity of genes causing or contributing to diseases whose label contains the string 'malignant colon neoplasm'. Moreover, count the different phenotypes of those diseases.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'malignant colon neoplasm' RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS Num_miRNAs, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS Num_Phenotypes

question: Identify gene–miRNA–cardiovascular disease combinations where the genes have activity regulated by miRNAs and cause or contribute to cardiovascular diseases, and rank these combinations by the number of distinct phenotypes associated with the disease. Return the gene label, miRNA label, cardiovascular disease label, and the number of distinct phenotypes, limited to 5 results with ties resolved alphabetically.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype)<-[:has_phenotype]-(cd:Cardiovascular_disease)<-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]-(g:Gene)<-[:regulates_activity_of]-(m:miRNA) RETURN g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA, cd.Label AS CardiovascularDisease, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS NumPhenotypes ORDER BY NumPhenotypes DESC, g.Label ASC, m.Label ASC, cd.Label ASC LIMIT 5

question: Identify phenotypes of cardiovascular diseases that are caused or contributed by genes regulated by miRNAs. Return the miRNA label, gene label, cardiovascular disease label, and phenotype label.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype)<-[:has_phenotype]-(cd:Cardiovascular_disease)<-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]-(g:Gene)<-[:regulates_activity_of]-(m:miRNA) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, cd.Label AS CardiovascularDisease, p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Which diseases have phenotypes that are feature of cancers where certain miRNAs are over-expressed when the reported FDR of the expression is greater than 1.9 times 10^-10 (1.9e-10)?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[r:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease) WHERE r.FDR >1.9e-10 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer, p.Label AS Phenotype, d.Label AS Disease, r.FDR AS FDR

question: Which miRNAs participate in GO terms whose disruption causes the disease labeled as 'apperceptive agnosia'? Return the disease label, GO term label, and miRNA label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease{Label:'apperceptive agnosia'})-[:disease_caused_by_disruption_of]->(go:GO)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, go.Label AS GOterm, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which genes are regulated by mature miRNAs that develop from pre-miRNAs transcribed from the 'MIR625' gene? Return the pre-miRNA label, mature miRNA label, and target gene label, along with the sequence lengths of pre-miRNA, mature miRNA, and target gene.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene {Label:'MIR625'})-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(t:Gene) RETURN pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA, t.Label AS TargetGene, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS MaturemiRNALength, SIZE(t.Sequence) AS TargetGeneLength, SIZE(pre.Sequence) AS Pre_miRNALength

question: Retrieve all properties of diseases that cause disruption of biological processes occurring in cellular components. Return the disease properties (PROPERTIES(disease)), biological process label, and cellular component label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:occurs_in]->(cc:Cellular_component) RETURN PROPERTIES(d), bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Which biological processes have GO terms as parts and where molecular functions enabled by miRNAs are part of them? Return the miRNA label, molecular function label, biological process label, and GO term label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:enables]->(mf:Molecular_function)-[:part_of]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_part]->(go:GO) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, go.Label AS GOterm

question: Which diseases whose label contains both the words 'deafness' and 'unilateral' have phenotypes that characterize biological processes in which pre-miRNAs participate? Return the pre-miRNA label, biological process label, phenotype label, and disease label.
cypher: MATCH (pre:pre_miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_characteristic]->(ph:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'deafness' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'unilateral' RETURN pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, ph.Label AS Phenotype, d.Label AS Disease

question: List the GO terms that cellular component are part of. Consider only cellular components where miRNAs expressed by cancers (excluding those whose label contains the string 'oma') are located. Return the cancer label, miRNA label, cellular component label, and GO term label.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(go:GO) WHERE NOT toLower(c.Label) CONTAINS 'oma' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent, go.Label AS GOterm

question: Identify miRNAs transcribed from genes whose label ends with three digits followed by 'C', where the same gene also transcribes a pre-miRNA that develops into another miRNA. Return the gene label, source miRNA, pre-miRNA, and mature miRNA labels.
cypher: MATCH (m1:miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m2:miRNA) WHERE g.Label =~ '.*[0-9]{3}[C]$' RETURN g.Label AS Gene, m1.Label AS Source_miRNA, pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m2.Label AS Mature_miRNA

question: Identify phenotypes containing the word 'pain' of the disease labeled as 'malignant pancreatic neoplasm' where that disease is caused or contributed to by miRNAs located in the cellular component labeled as 'compact myelin'. Return the cellular component, miRNA, disease, and phenotype labels.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component {Label: 'compact myelin'})-[:location_of]->(m:miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease {Label: 'malignant pancreatic neoplasm'})-[:has_phenotype]->(ph:Phenotype) WHERE ph.Label CONTAINS 'pain' RETURN  cc.Label AS CellularComponent, m.Label AS miRNA, d.Label AS Disease, ph.Label AS Phenotype

question: List miRNAs containing '29c' that cause or contribute to diseases with phenotypes containing the word 'skeletal' in their label, where these phenotypes are also observed in the disease labeled as 'pituitary dwarfism'. Return the miRNA, disease, phenotype, and the related disease label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d1:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(d2:Disease {Label: 'pituitary dwarfism'}) WHERE m.Label CONTAINS '29c' AND p.Label CONTAINS 'skeletal' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, d1.Label AS Disease, p.Label AS Phenotype, d2.Label AS RelatedDisease

question: List all gene-pre-miRNA-miRNA maturation chains such that the resulting miRNA regulates the gene 'MTCO1P12'. Return the label of the gene, pre-miRNA, mature miRNA.
cypher: MATCH (g1:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g2:Gene {Label: 'MTCO1P12'}) RETURN g1.Label AS TranscribingGene, pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which cellular components, that are part of at least one GO term, participate in other GO terms where miRNAs are located in the first GO terms? Return the miRNA label, the GO term containing the component, the cellular component label, and the GO term it participates in.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(go1:GO)-[:has_part]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:participates_in]->(go2:GO) RETURN  m.Label AS miRNA, go1.Label AS ParentGO, cc.Label AS CellularComponent, go2.Label AS ParticipatingGO

question: Which genes, whose labels end with two digits followed by 'A' or 'B', are regulated by miRNAs that participate in biological processes whose disruption causes neurodegenerative diseases? Return the neurodegenerative disease, the disrupted biological process, the miRNA, and the regulated gene.
cypher: MATCH (nd:Neurodegenerative_disease)-[:disease_caused_by_disruption_of]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene) WHERE g.Label =~ '.*[0-9]{2}[AB]$' RETURN nd.Label AS NeurodegenerativeDisease, bp.Label AS DisruptedProcess, m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS RegulatedGene

question: Which diseases, whose label contains the word 'sclerosis' but not 'juvenile', are caused or contributed by genes whose activity is regulated by miRNAs transcribed from other genes? Return the source gene, the miRNA, the target gene, and the disease label.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(t:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) WHERE toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'sclerosis' AND NOT toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'juvenile' RETURN DISTINCT g.Label AS SourceGene, m.Label AS miRNA, t.Label AS TargetGene, d.Label AS Disease

question: Identify cellular components whose label contains the word 'chromosome' that are part of GO terms and are locations of miRNAs characterized by being a material basis for cancers when somatic mutations occur. Return the cancer, miRNA, cellular component, and GO term labels.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:has_material_basis_in_somatic_mutation_in]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(go:GO) WHERE toLower(cc.Label) CONTAINS 'chromosome' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent, go.Label AS GOterm

question: Which miRNAs are expressed by cancers that are superclass of diseases having the phenotype labeled as 'Quadriceps muscle atrophy'? Return the phenotype, disease, cancer, and miRNA labels.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype {Label:'Quadriceps muscle atrophy'})-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA) RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, d.Label AS Disease, c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which miRNAs are expressed by cancers that are superclass of the disease labeled as 'chondrosarcoma'? What phenotypes are associated with this disease? Return the phenotype, disease, cancer, and miRNA labels.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA) WHERE toLower(d.Label) = 'chondrosarcoma' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, d.Label AS Disease, c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which diseases are caused or contributed to by genes starting with thw string 'SYNC' that are regulated by miRNAs expressed in cancers whose label contains the word 'benign'? Return the cancer, miRNA, gene, and disease labels.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'SYNC' AND toLower(c.Label) CONTAINS 'benign' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, d.Label AS Disease

question: Identify molecular functions containing the word 'RNA' or 'DNA' that are part of biological processes in which miRNAs characterized by a label ending with a number and expressed in phenotypes participate. Return the phenotype, miRNA, biological process, and molecular function labels.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_part]->(mf:Molecular_function) WHERE (toLower(mf.Label) CONTAINS 'rna' OR toLower(mf.Label) CONTAINS 'dna') AND m.Label =~ '.*[0-9]$' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, m.Label AS miRNA, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction

question: Identify diseases that are caused or contributed to by genes starting with 'CC', ending with '1', and having a 5-character-long label. Moreover, keep only genes regulated by miRNAs expressed in cancers whose label contains the string 'lipomatosis'. Return the cancer, miRNA, gene, and disease labels.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'lipomatosis' AND g.Label STARTS WITH 'CC' AND SIZE(g.Label) = 5 AND g.Label ENDS WITH '1' RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, d.Label AS Disease

question: Find GO terms that have molecular functions as parts and whose disruption causes the disease labeled as 'coenzyme Q10 deficiency' that has 'Hepatic failure' as a phenotype. Return the phenotype, disease, GO term, and molecular function labels.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype {Label:'Hepatic failure'})-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease {Label:'coenzyme Q10 deficiency'})-[:disease_caused_by_disruption_of]->(go:GO)-[:has_part]->(mf:Molecular_function) RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, d.Label AS Disease, go.Label AS Disrupted_GO, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction

question: Consider the GO term labeled as 'chromosome'. Find the cellular components in which miRNAs are located and count how many distinct miRNAs are located in each component. Return the cellular component label, GO term label, and miRNA count.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(go:GO {Label:'chromosome'}) RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, go.Label AS GOterm, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNA_count ORDER BY miRNA_count DESC

question: Which genes that cause or contribute to neurodegenerative disease have their activity regulated by the largest number of distinct miRNAs? Return the gene label, disease label, and miRNA count. Limit the result to the top 5 genes, ordering their labels alphabetically to avoid ties.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(nd:Neurodegenerative_disease) RETURN g.Label AS Gene, nd.Label AS Disease, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNA_count ORDER BY miRNA_count DESC, Gene ASC LIMIT 5

question: Which genes have activity regulated by miRNAs expressed in the diseases labeled as 'benign muscle neoplasm' and by miRNAs expressed in the disease labeled'anxiety disorder'? Which miRNAs are involved in each disease? Return the shared gene and the miRNAs in each disease along with disease labels.
cypher: MATCH (d1:Disease {Label: 'benign muscle neoplasm'})-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)<-[:regulates_activity_of]-(m2:miRNA)<-[:expresses]-(d2:Disease {Label: 'anxiety disorder'}) RETURN g.Label AS SharedGene, m.Label AS miRNA_in_d1, m2.Label AS miRNA_in_d2, d1.Label AS Disease1, d2.Label AS Disease2

question: How many distinct genes are regulated by miRNAs expressed by diseases and cause or contribute to neurodegenerative diseases?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(nd:Neurodegenerative_disease) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS RegulatedGeneCount

question: List diseases whose label contains the string 'neuropathy-sensorineural' and that are subclasses of other diseases having phenotypes characterizing specific GO terms. Return the label of the subtype, supertype parent, phenotype, and GO term.
cypher: MATCH (d1:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(d2:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype)-[:characteristic_of]->(go:GO) WHERE toLower(d1.Label) CONTAINS 'neuropathy-sensorineural' RETURN d1.Label AS Subtype, d2.Label AS Supertype, p.Label AS Phenotype, go.Label AS GOterm

question: Count how many diseases whose label contains the string 'neuropathy-sensorineural' are subclasses of other diseases having phenotypes characterizing specific GO terms.
cypher: MATCH (d1:Disease)-[:subclassof]->(d2:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype)-[:characteristic_of]->(go:GO) WHERE toLower(d1.Label) CONTAINS 'neuropathy-sensorineural' RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT d1) AS DiseaseCount

question: Identify autoimmune diseases that have as basis in feature phenotypes which are subclasses of other phenotypes, and count the number of distinct pre-miRNAs that cause or contribute to those diseases. Return the autoimmune disease, the parent phenotype, and the count of distinct pre-miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Autoimmune_disease)-[:disease_has_basis_in_feature]->(ph:Phenotype)-[:subclassof]->(parent:Phenotype) RETURN d.Label AS AutoimmuneDisease, parent.Label AS ParentPhenotype, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS Pre_miRNA_Count

question: Identify diseases that are predisposed towards other diseases, and rank them by the number of distinct pre-miRNAs that cause or contribute to the original disease. Return the source disease, the predisposed disease, and the count of distinct pre-miRNAs. Order by descending pre-miRNA count and alphabetically by the source disease label in case of ties, limiting the results to the top 10.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d1:Disease)-[:predisposes_towards]->(d2:Disease) RETURN d1.Label AS Disease, d2.Label AS PredisposedDisease, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS Pre_miRNA_Count ORDER BY Pre_miRNA_Count DESC, Disease ASC LIMIT 10

question: Identify GO terms that cellular components are part of and in which miRNAs expressed in neurodegenerative diseases are located. Return the neurodegenerative disease label, miRNA label, cellular component label, and GO term label.
cypher: MATCH (nd:Neurodegenerative_disease)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(go:GO) RETURN nd.Label AS NeurodegenerativeDisease, m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent, go.Label AS GOterm

question: Identify all the GO terms of which cellular components whose label contains the string 'ligase complex' are part. Moreover, consider only components in which miRNAs expressed in neurodegenerative diseases are located. Return the neurodegenerative disease label, miRNA label, cellular component label, and GO term label.
cypher: MATCH (nd:Neurodegenerative_disease)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(go:GO) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'ligase complex' RETURN nd.Label AS NeurodegenerativeDisease, m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent, go.Label AS GOterm

question: Which miRNAs participate in biological processes where 'anemia' diseases that have phenotypes containing the word 'defect' in their label cause their disruption? Return the phenotype label, disease label, biological process label, and miRNA label.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease)-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'anemia' AND p.Label CONTAINS 'defect' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, d.Label AS Disease, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which miRNAs participate in biological processes disrupted by diseases whose label contains the string 'carnitine palmitoyl' that have phenotypes containing the string 'aortic valve'? Return the phenotype label, disease label, biological process label, and miRNA label.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease)-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'carnitine palmitoyl' AND p.Label CONTAINS 'aortic valve' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, d.Label AS Disease, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which biological processes have the miRNA 'hsa-miR-125a-5p' as a participant, and are disrupted by diseases having phenotypes whose label contains the word 'bleeding'? Return the biological process label, disease label, phenotype label, and miRNA label.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype)-[:phenotype_of]->(d:Disease)-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA {Label: 'hsa-miR-125a-5p'}) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'bleeding' RETURN DISTINCT bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, d.Label AS Disease, p.Label AS Phenotype, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Identify autoimmune diseases that are subclasses of infectious diseases and are caused or contributed to by genes regulated by miRNAs. For each disease, report the disease label, the length of the associated gene label, and the number of distinct regulating miRNAs. Order results by descending miRNA count and alphabetically by disease label in case of ties, limiting to the top 10.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Autoimmune_disease)-[:subclassof]->(:Infectious_disease) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, SIZE(g.Label) AS GeneLabelLength, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNACount ORDER BY miRNACount DESC, Disease ASC LIMIT 10

question: List miRNAs whose label does not end in '3p' that regulate the activity of the gene 'WNT5A' when the latter causes or contributes to the disease labeled as 'Robinow syndrome' that has the phenotype labeled as 'Abnormality of coagulation'. Return the miRNA label, and the gene synonyms.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g:Gene {Label: 'WNT5A'})-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease {Label: 'Robinow syndrome'})-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype {Label: 'Abnormality of coagulation'}) WHERE NOT m.Label ENDS WITH '3p' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, g.Synonym AS Synonym

question: Which genes are transcribed into pre-miRNAs that develop into miRNAs regulating target genes that cause or contribute to the disease labeled as 'sensory ataxia'? Return the source gene label, pre-miRNA label, mature miRNA label, and target gene label.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g2:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease {Label: 'sensory ataxia'}) RETURN g.Label AS SourceGene, pre.Label AS Precursor_pre_miRNA, m.Label AS Mature_miRNA, g2.Label AS TargetGene

question: How many different diseases are caused or contributed to by target genes regulated by miRNAs developed from pre-miRNAs transcribed from known genes? Return ONLY the count of distinct diseases.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g2:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT d) AS DiseaseCount

question: Which genes are transcribed into pre-miRNAs that mature into miRNAs regulating the activity of target genes that cause or contribute to the disease labeled as 'thoracic cancer'? Return the source gene label, pre-miRNA label, mature miRNA label, and target gene label.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene)-[:transcribed_to]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:develops_into]->(m:miRNA)-[:regulates_activity_of]->(g2:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease {Label: 'thoracic cancer'}) RETURN g.Label AS SourceGene, pre.Label AS Precursor_pre_miRNA, m.Label AS Mature_miRNA, g2.Label AS TargetGene

question: Which molecular functions are part of biological processes in which miRNAs, expressed by the cancer labeled as 'breast carcinoma', participate in? Return miRNA label, biological process label, and molecular function label.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer{Label:'breast carcinoma' })-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_part]->(mf:Molecular_function) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction

question: Retrieve molecular functions (label and description) that are part of biological processes in which miRNAs expressed by the cancer labeled 'sarcoma' participate in. Return also the miRNA labels and the biological process labels.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer{Label:'sarcoma'})-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:has_part]->(mf:Molecular_function) RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunctionLabel, mf.Description AS MolecularFunctionDescription, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which cancers express miRNAs that participate in biological processes where the molecular function labeled as 'cadherin binding involved in cell-cell adhesion' is a part? Return the cancer label, miRNA label, and biological process label.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function {Label: 'cadherin binding involved in cell-cell adhesion'})<-[:has_part]-(bp:Biological_process)<-[:participates_in]-(m:miRNA)<-[:expresses]-(c:Cancer) RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: Identify genes with activity regulated by miRNAs that cause or contribute to phenotypes feature of the disease labeled as 'toxic shock syndrome'. Return the phenotype label, gene label, and miRNA label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease {Label: 'toxic shock syndrome'})-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype)<-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]-(g:Gene)<-[:regulates_activity_of]-(m:miRNA) RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Identify genes with activity regulated by miRNAs that cause or contribute to the disease labeled as 'hypochromic anemia' and have at least one phenotype as a feature. Return the disease label, phenotype label, gene label, and miRNA label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease {Label: 'hypochromic anemia'})-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype)<-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]-(g:Gene)<-[:regulates_activity_of]-(m:miRNA) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, p.Label AS Phenotype, g.Label AS Gene, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find cancers that have phenotypes and express miRNAs that enable molecular functions whose label contains the string 'UTR binding'. Return molecular function label, miRNA label, cancer label, and phenotype label.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function)<-[:enables]-(m:miRNA)<-[:expresses]-(c:Cancer)<-[:phenotype_of]-(p:Phenotype) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'UTR binding' RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer, p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Which cancers having the phenotype labeled as 'Malar prominence' express miRNAs that enable the molecular function labeled as 'mRNA base-pairing translational repressor activity'? Return the miRNA label and the cancer label.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function {Label: 'mRNA base-pairing translational repressor activity'})<-[:enables]-(m:miRNA)<-[:expresses]-(c:Cancer)<-[:phenotype_of]-(p:Phenotype{Label: 'Malar prominence'}) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer

question: Find genes (we want both label and synonyms) regulated by miRNAs expressed in cancers that cause or contribute to the disease labeled as 'Li-Fraumeni syndrome'. Return also the matching cancers and miRNAs' label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease {Label:'Li-Fraumeni syndrome'})<-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]-(g:Gene)<-[:regulates_activity_of]-(m:miRNA)<-[:expresses]-(c:Cancer) RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabels, g.Synonyms AS GeneSynonyms, m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer

question: Find genes (labels and IDs) whose activity is regulated by miRNAs expressed in cancers that cause or contribute to the disease labeled as 'plasmablastic lymphoma'. Return also the label of cancers and miRNAs.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease {Label:'plasmablastic lymphoma'})<-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]-(g:Gene)<-[:regulates_activity_of]-(m:miRNA)<-[:expresses]-(c:Cancer) RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel, g.ID AS GeneIDs, m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer

question: Identify GO terms of which the cellular components are part, in which biological processes containing the word 'protein' in their labels occur and in which miRNAs participate. Return the miRNA label, biological process label, cellular component label, and GO term label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:occurs_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(go:GO) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'protein' RETURN  m.Label AS miRNA, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, cc.Label AS CellularComponent, go.Label AS GOterm

question: Identify GO terms of which the cellular components are part, in which biological processes (1) involving the keyword 'RNA' in their label occur and (2) in which miRNAs participate. Return the miRNA label, biological process label, cellular component label, and GO term label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA)-[:participates_in]->(bp:Biological_process)-[:occurs_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(go:GO) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'RNA' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess, cc.Label AS CellularComponent, go.Label AS GOterm

question: Identify diseases whose label contains the word 'liver' that are caused or contributed by genes from which miRNAs are transcribed and that are functions of the GO term whose label contain the word 'cholesterol'. Return the GO term label, miRNA label, gene label, and disease label.
cypher: MATCH (go:GO)-[:function_of]->(m:miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) WHERE go.Label CONTAINS 'cholesterol' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'liver' RETURN  go.Label AS GOterm, m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, d.Label AS Disease

question: Identify diseases that are caused or contributed to by genes from which miRNAs are transcribed. Moreover, filter only miRNAs having GO terms whose label contains the word 'fat cell' as a function. Return the GO term label, miRNA label, gene label, and disease label.
cypher: MATCH (go:GO)-[:function_of]->(m:miRNA)-[:transcribed_from]->(g:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(d:Disease) WHERE go.Label CONTAINS 'fat cell'  RETURN go.Label AS GOterm, m.Label AS miRNA, g.Label AS Gene, d.Label AS Disease

question: Find phenotypes of diseases, that have as subclass cancers whose label contains the word 'adenocarcinoma' where the miRNA labeled as 'microRNA hsa-mir-182 precursor' is over-expressed. Return the miRNA label, cancer label, disease label, and phenotype label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Label:'microRNA hsa-mir-182 precursor'})-[:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer)-[:subclassof]->(d:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'adenocarcinoma' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer, d.Label AS Disease, p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Retrieve the labels and descriptions of the phenotypes of diseases that are superclasses of cancers whose label contains the word 'childhood' and where 'hsa-miR-429' miRNA are over-expressed. Return also the involved miRNAs label, cancers label, diseases label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Label:'hsa-miR-429'})-[:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer)-[:subclassof]->(d:Disease)-[:has_phenotype]->(p:Phenotype) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'childhood' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer, d.Label AS Disease, p.Label AS PhenotypeLabel, p.Description AS PhenotypeDescription

question: Identify diseases caused by the disruption of GO terms that have molecular functions which are part of biological processes. Return the disease label, GO term label, molecular function label, and biological process label.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)<-[:part_of]-(mf:Molecular_function)<-[:has_part]-(go:GO)<-[:disease_caused_by_disruption_of]-(d:Disease) RETURN d.Label AS Disease, go.Label AS DisruptedGO, mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, bp.Label AS BiologicalProcess

question: Identify cancers whose label contains the word 'malignant' where under-expressed miRNAs are in similarity relationship with pre-miRNAs participating in GO terms whose label contains the string 'biological process'. Return the GO term label, pre-miRNA label, miRNA label, and cancer label.
cypher: MATCH (go:GO)-[:has_participant]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:in_similarity_relationship_with]->(m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer) WHERE go.Label CONTAINS 'biological process' AND c.Label CONTAINS 'malignant' RETURN go.Label AS GOterm, pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer

question: Identify cancers whose label contains the word 'cervical' and where under-expressed miRNAs are in similarity relationship with pre-miRNAs whose labels contain '302' and participate in GO terms. Return the GO term label, pre-miRNA label, miRNA label, and cancer label.
cypher: MATCH (go:GO)-[:has_participant]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:in_similarity_relationship_with]->(m:miRNA)-[:under_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer) WHERE pre.Label CONTAINS '302' AND c.Label CONTAINS 'cervical' RETURN go.Label AS GOterm, pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer

question: Identify cancers whose label contains the word 'hepatocellular' where over-expressed miRNAs are similar to pre-miRNAs containing '93' in their label and participate in GO terms. Return the GO term label, pre-miRNA label, miRNA label, and cancer label.
cypher: MATCH (go:GO)-[:has_participant]->(pre:pre_miRNA)-[:in_similarity_relationship_with]->(m:miRNA)-[:over_expressed_in]->(c:Cancer) WHERE pre.Label CONTAINS '93' AND c.Label CONTAINS 'hepatocellular' RETURN go.Label AS GOterm, pre.Label AS Pre_miRNA, m.Label AS miRNA, c.Label AS Cancer

question: Find cancers that have as a feature the phenotype labeled as 'Wheezing', and identify gene pairs where one gene genetically interacts with another that causes or contributes to these cancers. Return the cancer label, gene1 label, and gene2 label.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype {Label:'Wheezing'}), (g1:Gene)-[:genetically_interacts_with]->(g2:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(c) RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, g1.Label AS Gene1, g2.Label AS Gene2

question: Find cancers having as a feature the phenotype labeled as 'Cough', and identify gene pairs where one gene genetically interacts with another contributing to those cancers. Return the cancer label, gene1 label, and gene2 label.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype {Label:'Cough'}), (g1:Gene)-[:genetically_interacts_with]->(g2:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(c) RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, g1.Label AS Gene1, g2.Label AS Gene2

question: Find genes with a 12-character-long label that genetically interact with other genes contributing to cancers with a phenotype as a feature. Return gene1 label, gene2 label, cancer label, and feature phenotype label.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:disease_has_feature]->(p:Phenotype), (g1:Gene)-[:genetically_interacts_with]->(g2:Gene)-[:causes_or_contributes_to_condition]->(c) WHERE SIZE(g1.Label) = 12 OR SIZE(g2.Label) = 12 RETURN g1.Label AS Gene1, g2.Label AS Gene2, c.Label AS Cancer, p.Label AS FeaturePhenotype

question: List miRNAs expressed in diseases that have phenotypes that are also characteristic of the GO term labeled as 'regulation of appetite'. Return phenotype label, disease label, and miRNA label.
cypher: MATCH (go:GO {Label:'regulation of appetite'})<-[:characteristic_of]-(p:Phenotype)<-[:has_phenotype]-(d:Disease)<-[:expressed_in]-(m:miRNA) RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, d.Label AS Disease, m.Label AS miRNA

question: List miRNAs expressed in diseases that have phenotypes that are also characteristic of the GO term labeled as 'cognition' . Return phenotype label, disease label, and miRNA label.
cypher: MATCH (go:GO {Label:'cognition'})<-[:characteristic_of]-(p:Phenotype)<-[:has_phenotype]-(d:Disease)<-[:expressed_in]-(m:miRNA) RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, d.Label AS Disease, m.Label AS miRNA

question: Find cancers and their expressed miRNAs located in cellular components part of the GO term labeled as 'extracellular region'. Return the cancer label, miRNA label, cellular component label, source, and method of the expression relationship.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[r:expresses]->(m:miRNA)-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(go:GO {Label:'extracellular region'}) RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent, r.Source AS Source, r.Method AS Methods

question: Identify cancers expressed by the miRNA 'hsa-miR-125b-5p' located in cellular components that are part of any GO term. Return the cancer label, miRNA label, cellular component label, and GO term label.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer)-[:expresses]->(m:miRNA {Label:'hsa-miR-125b-5p'})-[:located_in]->(cc:Cellular_component)-[:part_of]->(go:GO) RETURN c.Label AS Cancer, m.Label AS miRNA, cc.Label AS CellularComponent, go.Label AS GOterm
